productDisplayName: ID Men Brown Cult  Casual Shoes
description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in these casual lifestyle shoes from id. This shoe is a fresh take on the classic design and looks cool for office wear as well as casual outings.UpperBrown full grain leather uppers for comfort and protectionStitch detailing on the forefoot and in the form of stripes around the ankleLace-ups for snug FitLeather lining for greater comfortSuede overlay on the heel cup for enhanced style and durabilityMidsoleCushioned insole for all-day comfortOutsoleRubber outsole with a stacked heel and grooves for maxium traction and comfortShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts
